_comment: Universal skills the blueprint does NOT vendor. SETUP fetches each from its canonical public repo at install (always latest). Single source of truth — the blueprint never holds a copy that can silently drift. Refresh/export MUST NOT re-vendor these; it only maintains this list. The remaining skills under templates/skills/ are blueprint-owned (rnd, p:refine, p:wave-review, quality:prompt, quality:doc) or domain-hydrated shells (p:analysis, audit:code-hygiene, audit:security) and ship bundled.
